title: cephaelis guarupana
intro: Cephaelis guarupana, also known as guarana, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of guarana lie in its high concentration of caffeine, as well as its alkaloid content, including theobromine and theophylline. The health benefits of guarana include improved cognitive function, increased energy, and enhanced endurance, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements and energy drinks. Guarana is typically prepared through various herbal preparations, such as tea, capsules, and extracts, and is also used as a natural stimulant and weight loss aid.
